articles.title: Man arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after boy injured in crocodile enclosure
articles.description: A three-year-old boy was taken to Addenbrooke's Hospital with critical injuries and is in a stable condition, Cambridgeshire Police said.

articles.title: US lifts naval blockade as Iran's supreme leader says Trump made deal 'out of desperation'
articles.description: Iran's supreme leader says he disagrees with the deal and Donald Trump signed it "out of desperation".

articles.title: Bowen: US-Iran deal raises inescapable question of what the war was for
articles.description: While the human cost is clear, the Iranian regime has not just survived the war, it has been empowered.

articles.title: Teacher who murdered adopted baby son Preston Davey given whole life prison sentence
articles.description: Preston Davey died after months of sexual and physical abuse at the hands of Jamie Varley.
